title: Twitch streamer and YouTuber Deshae Frost responds to viral boat incident video, denies slapping woman and calls clip misleading
summary_full: Twitch streamer and YouTuber Deshae Frost has responded to a resurfaced viral boat incident video allegedly showing him in a physical altercation with a woman. He denied slapping her, claiming he only pushed her after being hit and insulted, and called the clip misleading. Frost said the video lacks context and insisted the situation has been misrepresented online.
